mapper.select: SELECT C.COMMENT_ID, C.CONTENTS, C.CREATED_AT, C.UPDATED_AT, C.POST_ID, C.CATEGORY_ID, C.USER_ID, U.NAME AS WRITER_NAME FROM COMMENTS C JOIN USERS U ON C.USER_ID = U.USER_ID WHERE C.POST_ID = #{postId} ORDER BY C.COMMENT_ID ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO COMMENTS ( COMMENT_ID, CONTENTS, CREATED_AT, POST_ID, CATEGORY_ID, USER_ID ) VALUES ( COMMENTS_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{contents}, CURRENT_DATE, #{postId}, ( SELECT CATEGORY_ID FROM B_BOARD WHERE POST_ID = #{postId} ), #{userId} )
